intro.title: Personalized AI Learning Assessment
intro.description: Get ready to discover your learning style, thinking approach, and AI knowledge—all in one simple, guided flow.

vark.title: VARK
vark.description: Discover the way you learn best: visually, by listening, reading, or hands-on. This helps us match you learning content formats that actually work for you.

cps.title: CSP
cps.description: Understand your cognitive process: how you analyze, solve, and interpret. Shapes how we guide you through activities.

ai_knowledge.title: AI Knowledge
ai_knowledge.description: We check what you already know, so you start at the right level. No pressure—just quick questions to tailor your experience.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.step1: Go through short, scenario-based questions—each focused on a unique aspect of how you learn and think.
how_it_works.step2: Complete everything in one seamless flow. There's no right or wrong: every answer shapes your personalized path.
how_it_works.step3: Your instant results unlock a tailored AI learning journey built just for you.

why_matters.title: Why This Matters
why_matters.description: Personalized learning is proven to boost retention and motivation.

better_engagement.title: Better Engagement
better_engagement.description: You get content that adapts to your needs, keeping you interested—not overwhelmed.

faster_progress.title: Faster Progress
faster_progress.description: No wasted steps. No repeating what you already know.

intro.ready_subtitle: Take the assessment and see your personalized recommendations instantly.

journey_start.title: Personalize Your Learning Journey
journey_start.cps_title: How Do You Think and Solve Problems?
journey_start.subtitle1: Answer a few quick questions so we can tailor learning just for you.
journey_start.cps_subtitle: Next, we'll look at how you process information, approach challenges, and stay motivated while learning.
journey_start.ai_subtitle: This short assessment helps us understand your current familiarity with AI. Your responses will be used only to tailor the learning level and examples for you.
journey_start.choose_most_like_you: Just choose what feels most like you.

ai_points.point1: Maps your learning style, not your knowledge
ai_points.point3: Answer based on your current understanding

journey_start.footer_note: Your responses help us personalize your experience.
journey_start.subtitle2: Take this assessment to discover your AI learning style

ui.gain_points: Gain Skill Points for your AI Knowledge
ui.title: AI Skill Quest
